payload.label: sink
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped white glazed ceramic sink rim with a dark triangular basin interior visible toward the upper-left of the crop, sitting against a light speckled beige countertop; object appears close to the camera (approx. 0.5–0.7 m).
